flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Western Michigan University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.4k → $15.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Western Michigan University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($16.8k → $19.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Western Michigan University fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (14.3k → 12.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Western Michigan University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0% → 0.0%).
